svg.title: GENtle Protocol Cartoon: PCR Assay (pair-primer baseline)
svg.desc: Five-step pair-PCR strip from source template to selected ROI, assay setup, amplification, and amplicon/report outcome.
svg.text: GENtle Protocol Cartoon: PCR Assay (pair-primer baseline)
Five-step pair-PCR strip from source template to selected ROI, assay setup, amplification, and amplicon/report outcome.
A source template contains one user-selected
The assay narrows to the selected region of
interest; the same ROI can also be extracted
as a copy artifact elsewhere in the workflow.
One primer pair is planned to bracket the ROI
sequences remain inspectable in the report
turning the planned ROI into one amplicon
The accepted primer pair yields one
inspectable amplicon artifact and one linked
Model: event-sequence abstraction (features + overhangs + topology) | deterministic SVG export.
